query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sitter_availability (
  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sitter_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
  date VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('available', 'unavailable') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'available',
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (sitter_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  INDEX avail_sitter_idx (sitter_id),
  INDEX avail_date_idx (date),
  INDEX avail_sitter_date_idx (sitter_id, date),
  UNIQUE INDEX avail_unique_idx (sitter_id, date)
);

  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (sitter_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

  UNIQUE INDEX avail_unique_idx (sitter_id, date)
